title: Kinto Reijou Kula-sama ~Akuyaku Reijou ni Koisuru Himanashi!~
description: Her true identity is that of a macho girl who is physically and mentally fit because of her muscle training! Can the villainous daughter "Lady Coola", who is destined for destruction, use her muscle power alone to break the doom flag? And what are her relationships with the daughters around her and the handsome men she is trying to conquer?
author: Kio Nato
